# ROOF EXPRESS

> Diamond Certified roofing contractor serving 60 Bay Area cities. Residential & commercial roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters, skylights. CSLB #1072766. Free estimates at 650-666-5554.

## Company Info
- [Home](https://roof-ex.com/): Diamond Certified roofing contractor serving San Francisco Bay Area. Roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters & skylights. CSLB #1072766. Free estimates.
- [About Us — Diamond Certified Bay Area Roofer](https://roof-ex.com/about): Meet the ROOF EXPRESS team — Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite, CertainTeed Select ShingleMaster. 
- [Our Story — Bay Area Roofing Since 2017](https://roof-ex.com/story): How ROOF EXPRESS grew from a single crew in 2017 to the Bay Area's top-rated roofing company. Diamon
- [Customer Reviews — 5-Star Rated Roofer](https://roof-ex.com/reviews): Hundreds of verified 5-star reviews on Google, Yelp & Diamond Certified. See why Bay Area homeowners
- [Contact Us — Free Roofing Estimate Bay Area](https://roof-ex.com/contact): Get a free roofing estimate from ROOF EXPRESS. Same-day inspections, 24-hour digital quotes. Call 65
- [Our Roofing Process — 3-Checkpoint Quality System](https://roof-ex.com/methodology): ROOF EXPRESS 3-checkpoint methodology: rapid tear-off, mid-point inspection, final audit. Most roofs

## Roofing Services
- [Roofing Services — Repair to Replacement](https://roof-ex.com/services): Full-service Bay Area roofing: residential, commercial, flat roofs, gutters, skylights, and 24/7 eme
- [Residential Roofing — Shingle & Tile Systems](https://roof-ex.com/residential): Expert residential roofing for Bay Area homes. Asphalt shingles, tile, slate — Diamond Certified ins
- [Commercial Roofing — TPO & Flat Roof Systems](https://roof-ex.com/commercial): Commercial roofing for Bay Area businesses. TPO, modified bitumen, single-ply systems. Title 24 comp
- [Flat Roofing — TPO, Torch-Down & Coatings](https://roof-ex.com/flat): Bay Area flat roof specialists. TPO membrane, modified bitumen, torch-down, and silicone coatings. P
- [Roof Repair — Fast Leak Fixes, Same Day](https://roof-ex.com/roof-repair): Same-day roof repair in the Bay Area. Leak detection, emergency tarping, flashing repair, and shingl
- [Roof Replacement — Full System, 50-Year Warranty](https://roof-ex.com/roof-replacement): Complete roof replacement by Diamond Certified contractors. GAF Master Elite installation with up to
- [Gutter Installation — Seamless Aluminum & Copper](https://roof-ex.com/gutters): Custom seamless gutter installation for Bay Area homes. Aluminum, copper, steel systems. Proper sizi
- [Skylight Installation & Repair — Velux Certified](https://roof-ex.com/skylights): Velux skylight installation, repair, and replacement. Sun tunnels, deck-mount & curb-mount skylights
- [Emergency Roof Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Response](https://roof-ex.com/emergency): 24/7 emergency roof repair across the Bay Area. Storm damage, active leaks, emergency tarping. Call
